changelog.notes: Migrated to-do list from Notion to Todoist API — full read/write sync with labels for areas
Mega confetti explosion with spring physics, linked contacts saved to Google, undo daily check-in
Fixed group membership persistence, patch-aware contact updates, system groups filtering
Migrated to Google Contacts API, replaced Notion-based contacts with native sync
Added linked contacts, 3-step contact linking flow with optional group names
Fixed habit completion sync, improved routine scheduling
